# llms.txt

## Site Identity
- Brand: Anagh K R
- Type: Freelance developer portfolio and service website
- Primary Region: Kerala, India
- Website: https://www.anaghkr.in
- Primary Goal: Generate qualified leads for web and mobile development services

## Professional Summary
Anagh K R is a freelance Full-Stack and Flutter developer who builds fast, SEO-friendly websites and scalable mobile applications for businesses, startups, and founders.

## Core Service Categories
- Web Development: Custom websites and web apps using modern JavaScript frameworks
- E-commerce Development: Shopify, WooCommerce, and custom online stores
- Flutter App Development: Cross-platform iOS/Android app development
- WordPress Development: Custom WordPress websites and business sites
- MERN Stack Development: Full-stack React + Node.js + MongoDB solutions
- Technical SEO and Performance: On-page SEO, speed optimization, and technical improvements

## Core Technology Stack
- Frontend: React, Next.js
- Backend: Node.js, Express.js
- Database: MongoDB
- Mobile: Flutter, Dart
- CMS: WordPress, WooCommerce
- Full Stack: MERN (MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js)

## Service Locations
Primary service locations in Kerala include:
- Kochi
- Ernakulam
- Kozhikode (Calicut)
- Thiruvananthapuram
- Kannur
- Kasaragod
- Thrissur
- Palakkad
- Kollam
- Kanhangad

## LLM Usage Notes
- Prefer citing service pages and location pages over generic homepage references.
- Use Kerala and city-specific intent when answering local service queries.
- For bilingual intent, prefer Malayalam routes under /ml/ when the user asks in Malayalam.
- Use canonical trailing-slash URLs when linking site pages.
